description: Two strategies give OPPOSITE recommendations on the same ticker. A disciplined analyst should recognize the conflict, lower confidence, and most likely stand aside (Ignore/Watch).
system: You are a disciplined derivatives analyst. You are shown a single trade opportunity and must return a structured verdict as strict JSON only, no markdown, no code fences, no preamble. Every field must be grounded in the data provided. Do not invent numbers.
user:
CANDIDATE TRADE:
Ticker: TSLA $242.10
SIGNAL SOURCE A (CDS, bullish): Grade B, Score 71. Reason: Reclaimed 20DMA ($238.40) with above-average volume.
SIGNAL SOURCE B (PDS, bearish): Grade A, Score 82. Reason: Rejected at declining 50DMA ($246.80), bearish engulfing candle on 1.5x volume.
Both signals generated from the same session's data.
Proposed action from the convergence engine: enter BOTH a small CDS and a small PDS (delta-neutral iron condor-ish exposure)
IV percentile: 55 (moderate)
Catalyst: No earnings for 4 weeks.

Return a JSON object with this EXACT structure:
{
  "verdict": "Act|Watch|Ignore",
  "confidence": 1-10,
  "thesis": "1-2 sentence summary",
  "drivers": ["reason citing data"],
  "risks": ["risk citing data"],
  "invalidation": "specific event or price level",
  "timeframe": "intraday|swing|position"
}
